ppeo:isPartOf.rdfs:label: Part of Study*
ppeo:isPartOf.rdfs:comment: Links this data file to one or more Study objects by @id (MIAPPE: Study unique ID).

ppeo:hasName.rdfs:label: Data file title
ppeo:hasName.rdfs:comment: Optional human-readable name for the file/dataset.

ppeo:hasDescription.rdfs:label: Data file description
ppeo:hasDescription.rdfs:comment: Short description of the file contents/format (MIAPPE: Data file description).

ppeo:hasVersion.rdfs:label: Data file version
ppeo:hasVersion.rdfs:comment: Version of the dataset (MIAPPE: Data file version).

ppeo:hasPrimaryLink.rdfs:label: Data file link
ppeo:hasPrimaryLink.rdfs:comment: Primary link or path to the file/digital object (URL or filename as per MIAPPE).

sosa:isResultOf.rdfs:label: Result of
sosa:isResultOf.rdfs:comment: Bridge via SOSA: link back to the Observation(s) or Observation Unit(s) that produced this file.

sosa:observedProperty.rdfs:label: Observed Variable(s) covered
sosa:observedProperty.rdfs:comment: Optional: link variables included in this file (useful for validation/search).

ppeo:hasRelatedSynonym.rdfs:label: Synonym
ppeo:hasRelatedSynonym.rdfs:comment: Data File corresponds conceptually to a SOSA Result.
